title: Decide native LICHEN BLE UUID policy for coexistence
description: Decide whether native LICHEN BLE keeps NUS only in mutually exclusive product mode or moves to LICHEN-specific UUIDs before any combined native-plus-MeshCore firmware image. The current NUS collision makes simultaneous native and MeshCore services unsafe.
acceptance_criteria: Decision records UUID policy, mobile/client discovery impact, migration behavior for existing native clients, and which product modes remain blocked until the decision is implemented.
